channel.title: Money on Crime Empire Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Money on Crime Empire Guide

item.title: Casino Blackjack and Ride the Bus: Fastest Money Multiplier
item.description:
Short answer: Play "Ride the Bus" not Blackjack. Reddit community analysis shows Ride the Bus has +25% expected value per hand vs Blackjack's -0.5%. The optimal strategy: save at your property before going, gamble, save after a big win, reload if you lose big. With $1,000 starting cash and optimal play, you can turn it into $20K+ in 30 minutes.

Casino Games Compared

The casino at the north end of the map has three gambling games. Here is how they stack up:

item.title: $10K in First Hour: Delivery and Trash Dumping Route
item.description:
Short answer: Deliveries and trash dumping are the safest early-game methods. A single optimized route: take a delivery order ($50-100 per delivery), grab trash on the way ($5-15 per dump), and smash vending machines ($20-50 each). Repeat for 1 hour = $8K-$12K with zero police risk. This is the fastest legal-ish money before unlocking dealers.

Early Game Income Methods

Method Income Per Action Risk Time per Action Best For
Deliver orders $50-$150 None 2-4 minutes Steady income
Trash dumping $5-$15 per bag None 30 seconds Filler income
Smash vending machines $20-$50 Low (public) 10 seconds Quick cash
Sell to customers (street) $100-$400 Medium (police) 1-2 minutes Fast money
Casino gambling Variable None (with save) 5-30 minutes Big multiplier

The Optimal First-Hour Route

Setup: You need the Burned RV area as your base. Buy a trash can ($25 from Furniture shop) and place it at the RV. Grab a delivery order from your phone.
